@switch (processTypeCode()) { @case (CatalogueProcessesTypeEnum.registration) { @switch (formStateService.catastroSiete()?.type) { @case ('new') { } @case ('current') { } @case ('expired') { } } } @case (CatalogueProcessesTypeEnum.new_classification_update) { } @case (CatalogueProcessesTypeEnum.renewal_classification_update) { } @case (CatalogueProcessesTypeEnum.readmission) { } @case (CatalogueProcessesTypeEnum.general_data_update) { } }
